name: oh-my-claudelin
description: Hooks for the overlay. Generator pattern borrowed from skill-x. Run `bash scripts/gen-hooks.sh` after edits.

hooks.description: On session start, report any composed skill whose parent drifted since last_synced.
When FEATURE-MAP.md is edited, remind the user to run audit + recompose.
hooks.run: echo 'FEATURE-MAP.md edited. Run: bash scripts/doctor.sh && consider re-composing affected skills.'
